{{Infobox location
| name = Grand Hive
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Grand Hive Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The Grand [[Hive]] is a massive, planet-sized structure serving as the fortress for the last [[Iron King]], who matured over four centuries ago. Visually, it resembles a colossal skull composed of black iron and smooth, white skin, featuring long, tusk-like spikes protruding from its primary hangar bay. It is so immense that it can appear like a moon or a planet to observers. The structure functions as a base for the [[Iron Legion]], deploying thousands of craft that swarm like insects. Internally, it is characterized by vast machinery and extensive networks of [[steel]] walkways, though it was later discovered to be hollow after its core components were removed. The [[Hive]] is governed by a [[Bishop]], an awakened consciousness that directs the entity toward specific objectives. While it possesses defensive shields superior to those of fortress-worlds, the Grand [[Hive]] was famously devastated when a single ship utilized an [[Aethertech weapon]] to strike through its center, leaving the remains as a floating mass of metal and organic matter.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Grand [[Hive]] is a moon-sized fortress that served as the stronghold for the final [[Iron King]] to mature over four centuries ago. Having previously survived an attack and serving as the site where both [[Sola]] and the protagonist once died, the massive structure became the primary objective of [[The Last Horizon]]'s mission. During discussions between the [[Captain]] and [[Sola]], the structure was noted as a target that had been struck by an astral tide. The Grand [[Hive]]'s defenses were eventually compromised when a shot from the [[Fallen Sword]]’s [[Aethertech weapon]] destroyed its shields, causing ships to burst from every opening. The structure was ultimately broken into debris, leaving a field of wreckage consisting of chunks that can be tied together for the characters to scan.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] is the fortress of the last [[Iron King]] to mature over four centuries ago.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c28">''The Captain'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist and [[Sola]] previously died at the [[Grand Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39">''The Captain'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] is a moon-sized location that was previously attacked.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c39" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] is the target of [[The Last Horizon]]'s mission.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] is a topic of discussion for the [[Captain]] and [[Sola]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] is a massive structure that was struck by the narrator's astral tide.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c42">''The Captain'', chapter 42</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Ships burst from every opening in the [[Grand Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43">''The Captain'', chapter 43</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]]'s shields were destroyed by a shot from the [[Fallen Sword]]’s [[Aethertech weapon]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c43" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] was broken into debris.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44">''The Captain'', chapter 44</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The characters are scanning the wreckage of the [[Grand Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c44" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] is a wreckage located outside the viewport.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Grand Hive]] consists of chunks that can be tied together.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c48">''The Captain'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grand Hive]] is a group that moves toward specific locations in the [[Dornoth system]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grand Hive]] is a massive, floating hunk of meat and metal that remains in the shadow of a planet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grand Hive]] is the remains of a moon-sized entity.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Grand Hive]] has wreckage in the system.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c39">''The Engineer'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Grand Hive]] is located in the [[Dornoth system]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c26">''The Knight'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A Grand [[Hive]] is a specific type of [[Hive]] that has recently produced a [[King]]. This moon-sized mass consisting of flesh and metal once stretched like an asteroid belt throughout the [[Lichborn]] system. However, the Grand [[Hive]] eventually went missing after the inner components of the [[Iron King]]'s [[Hive]] were stolen.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Grand Hive]] is missing.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10">''The Pilot'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Grand Hive]] is a moon-sized chunk of flesh and metal.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Grand Hive]] stretches like an asteroid belt through the [[Lichborn]] system.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The inner components of the [[Iron King]]�s [[Hive]] have been stolen.}}
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|A [[Grand Hive]] is a type of [[Hive]] that has produced a [[King]] recently.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c22">''The Pilot'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|"Sola, you and I will meet to discuss the Grand Hive."<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
